meaning: n.蟄伜惠,螳槫惠,逕滓ｴｻ,蟄伜惠迚ｩ,螳槫惠迚ｩ
examples: I lead a pretty mundane existence.
Surely my existence cannot be so purposeless?
She felt estranged from her former existence.
There are scores of locations still in existence but one of special note includes Mission Dolores.
The existence of innovation-blocking groups has been and continues to be an important barrier to riches.
